Name: Percentage of SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week occurring immediately after SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' out of all 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Percentage of process variants where SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week is followed by SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 3 days
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 3 days'

Name: Number of times SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week appears in variants that eventually lead to SW-EIC Accept
Metric: Number of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' activities for cases where activity 'SW-EIC Accept' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week occurrences that are not followed by any reviewer agreement (i.e., no SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs afterward)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' out of all cases where 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' does not happen

Name: Frequency of SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week compared to the frequency of SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 3 days
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 3 days'

Name: Percentage of cases where SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week is succeeded by at least one instance of SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Number of SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week events that occur before the first occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed in the same case
Metric: Number of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week that eventually leads to a revision outcome (SW-EIC Major Revision or SW-EIC Minor Revision)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' out of all 'SW-EIC Major Revision'

Name: Frequency of SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week in variants with performance duration above the median variant duration
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' out of all cases

Name: Percentage of SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week occurrences that are followed by Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 within the same case
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' out of all 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Ratio of SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week to SW-Initial Reviewer Selection across all cases
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' out of all 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Number of variants containing SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week that end in rejection (SW-EIC Reject or SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit)
Metric: Number of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' activities for cases where activity 'SW-EIC Reject' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week that is part of a loop involving repeated SW-AE Assign Reviewers activities
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' out of all 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Frequency of SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week relative to the total number of deadline-related activities (e.g., SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 3 days, SW-Reviewer Selection is now due, etc.)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 3 days'
